delivery.summary: Petrol RON95 16,500 L + Diesel B10 5,500 L (Invoice IPTBINV26007433, Ticket 8012815963, SN P7262245).

cfp_deposit.subtitle: All bank transfer (Maybank); zero cash CFP top-up today despite FR cell — see FINDING 1.

section_2.subtitle: 26 slips · grouped by destination bank account · Cleared column dropped (bank-clearance verification handled by separate skill)

slips.notes: G4S courier — receipt does NOT carry our account number, classified Safeguards.

section_2.safeguards_rule_note: Safeguards classification: a Safeguards (G4S) receipt is reclassified as We Direct Bank-in only if our company bank-account number is printed on the receipt itself (cash credits straight to that account). All 8 Safeguards slips today carry G4S courier numbering (HLnnnn) without our account printed → kept in the Safeguards channel under AMB 8135 (G4S clearing).

section_2b.subtitle: Headline reconciliation — every component of §1 Total Inflow accounted for, listed per approved bank account (§2). Each per-account row shows non-cash revenue only (Card + IFT + Cheque). Cash revenue is its own line (POS-derived; banked via Safeguards at variable timing, reconciled in §3). BUDI95 IPTB receivable + CFP voucher redemption + CFP top-up complete the reconciliation. Sum-of-components must equal §1 Total Inflow exactly — by construction, since each row is independently derived from POS / slips / reports.

rows.evidence: No non-cash revenue routed here today.

section_2b.result: ✓ Pass — total inflow reconciles to channel breakdown

section_3_cash.collected_breakdown: GreenPOS Cash 33,713.37 + Buraqmart cash 144.70 + CFP cash top-up 0.00
section_3_cash.footer_note: FR closing cash RM 11,455.18 falls short of the audit's expected balance by RM 276.13 — see FINDING 4. Possible cause: CFP cash top-up cell on FR is mis-stated (FINDING 1) so closing cash carries that error forward.

section_4_fuel.footer_note: Delivery 25/04 08:42 (SN P7262245, ticket 8012815963, IPTBINV26007433 RM 72,006.00). Dipping report covers only one petrol tank (5,572 L change) — multi-tank receiving via Tanks 1-4 not fully documented (FINDING 5).

section_5_checklist: Present: GreenPOS Daily Complete Report, Shift A (SHARUL) + Shift B (HANISAH) till reports, Fund Report v8, CFP report (full day) + CFP Shift A, Merchant settlements (3 slips), 25 proof-of-fund slips, BuraqMart Autocount POS daily + Shift A + Shift B + Stock Take Shift A, Fuel delivery order (IPTBINV26007433 + dipping + delivery report), PUKAL BUDI95 receipts (Shift A + Shift B). Partial: Stock Take MART Shift B (not in folder, only Shift A present). Missing: Lot rental records (no rental activity recorded today). N/A: iBing (BL has no iBing).

section_6_findings.title: FR "CFP Cash Top-up" RM 22,868.50 mis-stated.
section_6_findings.body: Cash CFP top-up cell on FR shows RM 22,868.50 yet only one CFP top-up exists today (TTCFP slip 12 RM 967.50 via Maybank) — a bank transfer, not cash. The figure 22,868.50 is close to BUDI95 cash sales (RM 22,185.67) and appears to be a wrong-cell entry. Distorts cash-balance view by RM 22,868.50 (cf. FINDING 4).
section_6_findings.action: Have HANISAH correct the FR — set Cash CFP Top-up to 0; show the RM 967.50 only under Instant Transfer (CFP). Re-issue FR.

section_6_findings.title: Eight TT-NonCFP slips RM 401.50 unmatched in 25/04 AmBank pool.
section_6_findings.body: Slips 05, 08, 09, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 22 (RM 40, 78, 30, 73.50, 50, 15, 50, 50, 50 = RM 436.50) carry no corresponding match in today's AmBank 8146 printout window. Bank-clearance verification has moved to a separate skill (sale-audit no longer ties slip rows to ledger credits). Flagging here as a referral so the bank-clearance audit picks it up.
section_6_findings.action: Defer to the new bank-clearance audit skill once it ships; this is no longer in sale-audit's scope.

section_6_findings.title: Merchant fuel POS vs FR variance RM 410.47.
section_6_findings.body: POS Credit Card MOP RM 1,483.77 includes BUDI95 credit-card payment RM 485.64; FR Merchant Settlement aggregates RM 1,073.30 (380 + 688.30 + 5). The two reconcile after BUDI95 split (1,483.77 − 485.64 = 998.13 vs 1,073.30 = +75.17 still unexplained).
section_6_findings.action: Reconcile BUDI95 merchant component against AmBank EDC settlement; investigate 75.17 residual.

section_6_findings.title: §3 Cash flow — FR closing cash short by RM 276.13.
section_6_findings.body: Audit's expected on-site cash RM 11,731.31 (= opening 217.24 + collected 33,858.07 − banked-in 22,344.00). FR printed closing cash RM 11,455.18. Variance −276.13 — Case A (FR < expected): either an inflow went unrecorded today (likely the cash component of the mis-stated CFP top-up cell, see FINDING 1) or staff under-declared closing cash.
section_6_findings.action: Recount cash drawer; re-issue FR with corrected CFP top-up classification (FINDING 1).

section_6_findings.title: Fuel delivery dipping incomplete.
section_6_findings.body: 25/04 delivery 22,000 L (Petrol 16,500 + Diesel 5,500) per IPTBINV26007433. Dipping report shows only one petrol tank's stock-in change (5,572 L), but the delivery is split across Tanks 1, 2, 3, 4 per handwritten note. Receiving evidence does not document each-tank intake.
section_6_findings.action: Have site-staff record per-tank before/after dipping for every multi-tank delivery; cross-foot to delivery ticket QTY.

section_6_findings.title: GreenPOS vs FR fuel grand-total variance RM 17.40.
section_6_findings.body: POS RM 48,542.40 vs FR RM 48,525.00. FR shows "Crash 0" reconciliation note.
section_6_findings.action: Verify if FR adjustment "−20.00 / Check 0.001" relates; bring GreenPOS report and FR cell into agreement.

section_6_findings.title: §5 Stock Take MART Shift B partial.
section_6_findings.body: Only Shift A stock-take attached for BuraqMart; Shift B not in folder. Day-end inventory variance can't be fully reconciled.
section_6_findings.action: Have BS request Shift B stock-take from HANISAH and back-fill into the daily folder.

section_6_findings.title: §3a aggregation integrity — Cash-in-Today variance RM +348.67.
section_6_findings.body: FR Cash line declared RM 11,237.94 but CDM slips total RM 11,586.61. Case B (FR < Sum of slips): funds reached the bank; FR understated by RM 348.67. The four other aggregated FR lines (Safeguards, IFT-CFP, IFT-NonCFP, Merchant) reconcile clean.
section_6_findings.action: Amend the FR Cash row to RM 11,586.61; re-issue FR. The clean rows stay clean.
